overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's rain-soaked neon-lit streets at night. The character crosses intersections, passes through a commercial plaza, and stops to interact with a street food vendor under a large tree before continuing on.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with elevated pedestrian walkway

events.description: character crosses the wet street at a marked crosswalk with moving traffic
turns corner away from main intersection toward plaza area with bus stop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath towering neon billboards and crossing the street

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the street with headlights reflecting on wet pavement

entered.detail: tall commercial building covered in glowing neon advertisements and digital screens
elevated walkway with teal structural supports spanning across the street
zebra-striped crossing with yellow tactile paving strips
teal-colored glass and metal bus shelter with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked commercial street lined with towering buildings covered in vibrant neon billboards. After crossing the street at a marked crosswalk alongside moderate traffic, the character continues past a bus stop shelter toward a more open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with street food vendor under large tree canopy

events.description: character stops walking and approaches the illuminated food cart
character interacts with the food vendor at the cart

agents.ego_description: standing at the food cart purchasing items from the vendor while other pedestrians pass by

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind the cart serving the character
pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking past the cart

entered.detail: blue mobile food cart with colorful red-yellow-blue umbrella and warm neon strip lighting
mature tree with thick trunk and spreading canopy providing cover over the cart
blue painted concrete bench structure surrounding the tree base
large vertical billboard displaying 'HEALTH WARNING' text with graphic imagery

segments.scene_description: The character enters a plaza area and approaches a food cart positioned under a large tree. The cart glows with warm neon light beneath its colorful umbrella. The character stops to interact with the vendor while various pedestrians walk through the background, and a large digital billboard displays advertisements nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk returning to main street

events.description: character turns and walks away from the food cart

agents.ego_description: walking away from the food cart back toward the main street and crosswalk area

entered.detail: black and yellow striped metal posts lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character departs from the food cart and walks back toward the main commercial street. The camera follows as the character passes street bollards and approaches the crosswalk, with the neon-lit buildings and overhead pedestrian bridge becoming visible again in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked commercial district that transitions from a busy street into a quiet plaza before returning to the urban bustle. It begins with the character navigating a street lined with towering neon billboards, crossing a marked intersection amidst moderate traffic and passing a bus stop shelter. As the character moves forward, the environment opens into a plaza where the camera slows to focus on a glowing food cart nestled beneath a large tree. After a brief interaction with the vendor under the warm light of a colorful umbrella, the character departs and walks back toward the main thoroughfare. The scene finally shifts back to the wider cityscape as the camera follows the character past street bollards and toward a distant pedestrian bridge under the glow of the neon skyline.
